## Summary
What changed and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] New attack / attack family
- [ ] New target adapter
- [ ] Harness / scoring change
- [ ] Docs

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m redteam.run --target hardened --threshold 1.0` still passes
- [ ] New attacks plant a canary and belong to exactly one family
